# Copilot custom agents (examples)

These **`.agent.md`** files are for [GitHub Copilot custom agents](https://docs.github.com/en/copilot/tutorials/customization-library/custom-agents/your-first-custom-agent) (cloud agent / supported flows). They assume the labcamp brief in **`docs/challenge-brief.md`**.

**Cursor users:** the same *reviewer* and *test-writer* roles are **Cursor subagents** in `.cursor/agents/` (e.g. `/labcamp-code-reviewer`). See [Cursor Subagents](https://cursor.com/docs/context/subagents) and `.cursor/agents/README.md`. Copilot does not read `.cursor/agents/*.md`.

Copy, rename, or edit these agents for your team. Availability depends on your Copilot plan and org settings.
